message:
fix: retry on OpenAI cyber_policy_violation 403 errors

OpenAI's cyber_policy_violation is a temporary account-level ban that
clears after a few minutes. Previously all 403s were non-retryable,
causing 5 task failures in the last eval run. Now detects this specific
error code and retries with 60s default backoff.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
